name: lusik-and-sons
description: Root package.json. Hosts the SPA build pipeline (Vite + Tailwind PostCSS — migration in progress, see CLAUDE.md § Vite migration) and the test harness (Playwright for browser smoke tests, Node's built-in test runner for backend unit tests). Functions have their OWN package.json under netlify/functions/ so the Stripe SDK can be marked as external — DO NOT MERGE the two graphs. `type: module` means root-level .js + src/**/*.js are interpreted as ESM (matches their `export` syntax); .mjs files and the netlify/functions/ subtree (which has its own package.json with `type: module` too) are unaffected.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
